entry.title: Re: System delay and dbtable data governance
entry.content:
Hi ,

 

Could you please check KBA 2388483 to learn about these dbtables?

##2388483 - How-To: Data Management for Technical Tables

If further help is required, this will need to contact the responsible team of the dbtable.

 

Best regards,

Leo

SAP Support

entry.title: Unable to launch SAPUI5 Task while opening in SAP BTP Workzone My Inbox app.
entry.content:
i,

I've followed all the steps as mentioned in the tutorial as well as pre-requisite tutorials in my BTP trial account (Integrate UI5 task  - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-integrate-sapui5-task-process.html    )

However, the My Inbox app is not opening the task, although I can see number of tasks on the tile in the workzone site launchpad. refer screenshots 1 and 2.

Also the Process trigger (local copy) app is not loaded which created using the custom SAP UI5 task (workflow UI MTA module) for SBPA approval Process as per the tutorial (Run process from site - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-run-business-process-business-site.html ). Refer screenshot 3.

error screenshots given below -

1. MyInbox app shows number of Tasks 

2. Error on opening My Inbox app -

3. Error on load in Process trigger App local copy -

Thanks,

Varad

entry.title: MACRO PARA CARGAR UN ARCHIVO PDF EN FORMA MASIVA
entry.content:
hola

Buenas noches

disculpen ....

existira alguna macro que pueda cargar archivos pdf en forma masiva en la transaccion FB03 de forma masiva?

tengo este pero se queda en el cuadro de importacion y de alli no pasa

If Not IsObject(application) Then
Set SapGuiAuto = GetObject("SAPGUI")
Set application = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine
End If
If Not IsObject(connection) Then
Set connection = application.Children(0)
End If
If Not IsObject(session) Then
Set session = connection.Children(0)
End If
If IsObject(WScript) Then
WScript.ConnectObject session, "on"
WScript.ConnectObject application, "on"
End If
session.findById("wnd[0]").maximize
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/okcd").text = "/nfb03"
session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/txtRF05L-BELNR").text = "1500028857"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtRF05L-BUKRS").text = "5000"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/txtRF05L-GJAHR").text = "2024"
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/titl/shellcont/shell").pressButton "%GOS_TOOLBOX"
session.findById("wnd[0]/shellcont/shell").pressContextButton "CREATE_ATTA"
session.findById("wnd[0]/shellcont/shell").selectContextMenuItem "PCATTA_CREA"

quise cargarlo de esta direccion 

session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILENAME").text = "C:\Users\Luis Lezcano\Documents\01.pdf"

pero nada

agradecere mucho su ayuda

 

gracias

entry.title: Copying condition type from Quotation to Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a scenario where we have a custom condition type ZL03. It is a header condition and we are able to maintain the value in the quotation as expected.

But, when we are trying to create Sales order wrt quotation, this condition type ZL03 is being greyed out in the SO Header level whereas it is having the option to edit in SO item level.

This is not the expected behaviour. We need the option to edit this condition type in SO Header level and grey out in SO item level.

How can this be resolved?

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Live data connection to SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi,

To copy the LMS connection, you need to redo the copy connection workflow. You will find 2 connections available to select.

Note: LMS connection is not standalone. It depends on the employee central connection. It is a best practice to copy them both

thanks

Mahehswar

entry.title: Re: PPDS - Planning with planning material
entry.content: Hi Rupesh can you please explain how to maintain Product hierarchy in PPDS.

entry.title: Re: Release Navigator for SAP BTP - What' s New in Q4 2024
entry.content: Hi there, The release Calendar link does not provide release schedule & details for year 2025

entry.title: Has the FUE Audit policy changed?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

As far as I know, FUE Audit is only performed on production systems.

Can you tell me whether DEV and QAS systems are also subject to FUE Audit management?

 

Regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP BRIM Prepayment functionality for Solution quotat...
entry.content:
Hi,

With "Early Billing" feature released in S/4HANA 2023 FPS2, subscription contracts can be billed and invoiced even before the contract start date.

Have a look at the Early Billing Scenario section under Date management in SAP help document of Subscription Order Management Date Management | SAP Help Portal

An early billing date, when assigned to the subscription item in a solution quotation or subscription order, is passed to the CI billing plan as Diff. Request Date which enables BIT request before its valid from. Thanks.

Regards
Deepak

entry.title: Re: Create Sales Order in S4/HANA from SAP IBP
entry.content: For the second question, https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration-for-data-services/help-center-for-sap-cloud-integration-for-data-services/rest-web-service-options is for the reference about Rest WS datastore in CI-DS

entry.title: Production Order Settlement with TECO/DLV Status
entry.content:
We have few production orders that are not yet completely settled. However, WIP is posted into Finance.

Now we have converted their status to TECO yesterday (15.01.2025) and trying to settle them.

We did the WIP / Variance calculation for them again and now running the settlement in CO88 for 12/2024 period.

But the system is not settling anything saying that there is no accrued cost on them for settlement.

When we try the settlement for them for 01/2025, settlement is happening and the variances are shown in the test run.

Why can't we settle them in 12/2024 ? These orders have many transactions posted in 12/2024 period also and logically it need to have settlement in 12/2024 also ?

Are we missing something here ? Please advise.

entry.title: SAP B1 HANA memory issue
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are running on SAP B1 ON HANA With 10.0 Version FP 2111. (Not B1 for Cloud)

We have 10 Users of SAP B1 (2 Prof + 8 Lim Logistics) & we use one block Hana Engine license to use SAP B1 HANA.

We face SLD issue frequently & our cloud partner informs us that HANA ran out of memory so it is the reason for SLD Service failure.

However after restart of services it resumes to function as normal & we will not face any issue for a month(approx) again same happens, Since this happens cyclic, we would like to understand what is the actual root cause.

As from cloud provider we have the root cause as HANA memory is low and need to increase memory to 2 blocks 128 Gb of memory.

We would like to calculate, estimate how much of memory is required for our database

  • We tried calculating based on three ways using below query we got 1.25 GB
with CST AS (
select SCHEMA_NAME,SUM(MEMORY_SIZE_IN_TOTAL/1024/1024/1024) as memGB
from M_CS_TABLES
group by SCHEMA_NAME)
select * from CST

order by memGB desc
  • After Backup of HANA database Uncompressed Size (1.12 GB)
  • After Backup of HANA database Compressed Size (511 MB)

Our calculation was very basic, 1.25 GB* 20 times of size = 25 GB

(10x for Size + 10x for operation capacity)

But still we have not reached 64 GB of HANA memory. Can HANA experts provide us the correct guidance pls on extending our HANA memory Block?

Thank you in advance

Best Regards

Anand Ramachandran

SAP HANA  SAP Business One SAP HANA Cloud 

@Laszlo @simon25 @Laszlo_Thoma @Cocquerel @PierreBrothier @pfefferf

entry.title: Re: Problem to connect Business Application Studio to S/4...
entry.content:
Hi @chris_SAP ,

You Can upload the certificate in Developing system server it will work.

 

Thanks and regards,

Deepak

entry.title: Re: Signavio overview user and used licences
entry.content:
Dear Merlezapf ,

It is not possible to directly extract the user information, including licenses, from the SAP Signavio User Management Section. However, you can follow these steps to obtain the required information:

  1. Extract User List Based on Email IDs:
    You can copy the list of all users based on their email IDs from the 'Manage Users & Access Rights' section of Process Manager under 'Users' tab by using the Message button.

     

     


      
     

  2. Manually Add License Information:
    Once the user list is available, you can manually fill in the license information by referring to the details in the User Management Section for the each user.

    Alternatively, if you need this information consolidated in one step, you can request one-time assistance by creating a support ticket by using for 'SAP for ME' service and support section.

    • Component for Support Ticket:
      BPI-SIG-PM-REP

       

      Br,
      Rahul Aryan

entry.title: Re: How to Restrict Copying the data from one BU_GROUP to another BU_GROUP IN SAP MDG BP
entry.content: Hi Derek, I want to skip the credit data from BP copy functionality. Where exactly we can write a code of enhancement ???

entry.title: Re: Form not shown in MyInbox Workzone standard
entry.content:
I have similar problem. The UI for tasks doesn't load on clicking the tile, however number of tasks are shown on the My Inbox tile in the BTP workzone site.

This is my trial account and I've followed all the steps & pre-requisites as per tutorial - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-create-sapui5-task-orderapproval.html.

Tried after updating the site settings to disable Asynchronous Loading, but still same error. Furthermore, on testing independently/standalone the Task UI is loaded for the approval process and also can see it My Inbox if opened from Build lobby.

entry.title: Difference between first bin location and default bin location in item master data
entry.content:
Hi Community, 

I am finding it difficult to understand the difference between "first bin location" and "default bin location" which comes under inventory tab in item master data screen, please do tell the difference between them.


Thank you

entry.title: Re: Solution Manager: Job REFRESH_ADMIN_DATA_FROM_SUPPORT...
entry.content:
Good Morning Vera,

I am in continuous contact with the support consultant working on the ticket, but up to this point, not breakthough has been achieved. I know that such problems are handled in the support channels but was looking for perhaps another partner who might have had this problem as well. You never know.

Of course, I asked a question, but if this is not wished in this forum, I will close the question and try my luck in another way. At the moment, the support channel is also not able to supply a solution. 

Best regards,

Kent

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG feature File Download and File Upload.
entry.content:
Hi Swetha,

In File Upload, you have to prepare and load individual files from every single entity, and also language dependent text fields require a separate upload.

Both Material/BP models have too many entities - so file upload/download becomes very time-consuming. A better approach would be to follow the standard mass processing solution given by SAP. 

You can refer to the link here : https://www.sap.com/documents/2016/06/16148af5-797c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

 

Hope this helps!!

entry.title: Add sales view to BP roles.
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created LSMW object for customer PERS in that How can I add sales view to BP roles.

Best Regards.

entry.title: SAP BTP - Applying Major Updates on Non-Production Subaccount
entry.content:
Hi all,

This is about the Major / Minor Updates / Upgrades that SAP provides on every month / quarterly basis. In order to have a better control and effectively manage the impact of this changes, can you please guide me on the below questions:

* Is there a way to apply the Updates / Releases on Non-Production Subaccount before the scheduled release date?

* Is there  a way to delay a release ? How to notify this to SAP?

entry.title: Can the approval workflow process in ALM be integrate with MyInbox?
entry.content: I would like MyInbox to be a central place for all the approval process. Can the ALM approval workflow process (notifications) integration with MyInbox?

entry.title: Re: Import data from BW Bex query to SAC system
entry.content: I assume you might be using classic account model which doesn't allow you to change existing import job. I would suggest you convert your model to new model type. With new model you can replace data source(with updated BW query) for existing import job and update mapping.

entry.title: Re: error in re init for ODP in BW HANA
entry.content: is this fixed ? we are getting same error

entry.title: Re: How to expose on-premise SAP B1 service layer with si...
entry.content: Hi @pal3kuno, the basic idea is having one small proxy server with public IP address instead of exposing the B1 server itself to the public network to keep the security best practice. I assume you are in the OP environment. then have one additional small server for NGIX as reverse proxy and put it in the DMZ and assign public IP address.

entry.title: Is Universal Worklist (UWL) is being obsoleted or replacing with MyInbox App?
entry.content:
I want to know whatever happen to Universal WorkList (UWL). 

1. Is it obsolete with the HANA S/4 or is being replaced with MyInbox App?

2. Is MyInbox App is now a central place for all workflow notifications?  What cloud production can it be integrated?  I know it will work with HANA S/4, what about other Cloud product such as Ariba, SuccessFactors, Concur, Fieldglass?

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft PowerPoint
entry.content:
Hi @Ashok_R ,

This add-in is an interesting feature they have introduced. I have tried to integrate with DSP, BW model from SAC to Power-point Addin but the widget quality is poor. The snapshots are unusable as it doesn't contribute the overall meaning of the widget with proper legends and readings as it is appearing for multiple dashboards that I have tried to integrate.

 

As you can see after clicking on edit ✏️ option from selecting widget as we could not select snapshot of "Add widget" as it does not provide any information.

 

 As you can see the widget quality for below chart (in PowerPoint) is poor and blur after adjusting the widget in MS PowerPoint also as compared to above SAC dashboard widget.

 

So, is there any workaround to improve this feature? or any planning to improve quality of widget and selecting same widget as snapshot from "add Widget" option directly?

Also is there any workaround to filter the widget data on add-in as it doesn't support any page filter or any scripted widget filter?

I'm unable to proceed due to an error that the clientId is not registered in the tenant. I've followed the exact steps mentioned in this blog. Can you please let me know if I've missed something here?

Hi all,

This is about the Major / Minor Updates / Upgrades that SAP provides on every month / quarterly basis. In order to have a better control and effectively manage the impact of this changes, can you please guide me on the below questions:

* Is there a way to apply the Updates / Releases on Non-Production Subaccount before the scheduled release date?

* Is there  a way to delay a release ? How to notify this to SAP?

entry.title: Re: Error in PGR via Inbound Delivery in S4 HANA for Inte...
entry.content: Yes I was able to solve it , do MIGO with the Inbound Delivery Number

entry.title: Re: Issue with PLANT 2 Stock Inclusion in PLANT 1 Shortag...
entry.content: Nobody here will have knowledge about your custom made Z-report. You need to contact your company's IT department / SAP Consultant. If you are the SAP Consultant, you need to debug the report and analyse the data.

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Services Client Keeps Crashing
entry.content:
@Jitendra_Kansal

Thank you for trying it out and confirming it works on your device! Let me provide more details about the issue:

The crash happens only under specific conditions:

  1. The Title field is bound to a non-mandatory property (e.g., {SupplierName}), and one or more records have this field empty.
  2. An Avatar is used in the Object Table configuration.

If I remove the Avatar property, the app doesn’t crash, even when the Title field is blank.
I am also facing a problem with the Action Bar in my app. It seems to be taking up more space than expected

entry.title: Re: writing approval condition
entry.content:
Hi Y-Yusuf 

Please check if below thread helps:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/writing-approval-procedure-query/qaq-p/9873637

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: How to expose on-premise SAP B1 service layer with si...
entry.content: Hi EunSeok, I have setup the ubuntu as my proxy server (IP: 192.168.1.1). How to get the public IP address? are you referring to this site https://whatismyipaddress.com? is that how to get the public IP? Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA TM in Subcontracting Scenario
entry.content:
Hi @tatsuya_eda ,

The whole subcontracting scenario doesn't have a tag 'basic' or 'advanced'. It's more the features and functions you use within. So, you can surely set up a subcontracting scenario within basic TM with its functional limitations.

Best regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG feature File Download and File Upload.

However, my question is if we are creating data records( new records) than will this process be also helpful or we have to goto File upload option? Many Thanks,

entry.title: Fiscal year variant Change K1 to K4
entry.content: Can we update Fiscal Year variant K1 to K4? Any impact?

entry.title: Re: Somehow couldnt connect to SLD. but to some logged in...
entry.content:
Hi Edy

Please check below steps:

1)  Restart Server tools service and check issue again.

2) If still having this issue, please check if you ca login to SLD control Center. If not, please check if someone changed B1SiteUser password ?

3) Also check SAP note 3043081 to reset the B1SiteUser password .

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: CCO Coupon cannot remove after add more items. Cancel...
entry.content:
Hi Tharindu

Wish you a very happy new Year !

Suggest you to create incident using component SBO-INT-CCO so that we could investigate this issue further.

Thank You.

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: Festival of People Analytics 2025: Celebrating The Value Of People Data This January
entry.content: Sorry to see that not all of us can attend..

entry.title: Re: Query using the service of Northwind of ODATA
entry.content: You can use Integration Suite Odata Adapter. That way, you can get the response as you wish. In browser you can't change the response.

entry.title: Obtain logged in users User ID/Student ID value for link or embed content
entry.content:
Is there any way to embed the User ID/Student ID value of the currently logged in user into an external link or to populate the value in the email link option in a Custom Tile.
We are needing the ID to be generated by the Student but then sent to another system for a request process. 

Also does anyone know of instructions/KBAs on what is the expected information for the Custom Tile "Link Info Advanced settings"

Have tried the utilising code from the Notification Email templates but the dynamic values do not appear to populate within the system.

entry.title: Re: How SAP Public Cloud Customize MRP Logic?
entry.content:
Added Manufacturing tag. Please remove other tags.

Suggest you read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Hierarchical strategy plan maintenance packet call pa...
entry.content:
Greetings,

perhaps you can try using offset in strategy package. When a strategy changes you will need to run transaction IP11U to update scheduling.

Below is an example of offset for 10 years of package one. Perhaps try in a test system first.

After running IP11U we get the following result - package one (which is yearly) has been "suspended" for 10 years. 

If you want to suspend it for indefinite time then try to use a bigger number - for example 100 (suspended for 100 years).

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: Badi/User-exit for vendor down payment request in f-47
entry.content:
Hello @former_member193382 

Can you please Specify Which BTE ?? And How ??

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: User-Exit/Badi for F-47/F-58
entry.content:
Hello @former_member193382 

Did you manage to do it??

entry.title: Re: SAC - Previous years calculation for account dimension
entry.content:
You may create either calculated account or calculated measure with sequence: 

  1. YTD(2024)- restricted measure on base measure with navigation -> To Date -> Year
  2. YTD -1 (2023) - restricted measure on measure YTD with navigation -> Previous -> Year 
  3. YTD -2 (2022) - restricted measure on measure YTD -1 with navigation -> Previous -> Year

entry.title: Re: DataAction (Calculation in data action for inflation...
entry.content: From your screenshot , seems the inflation rate and last year actual are from two different models while the data action in only working on one model...

entry.title: Re: Transport auf Multi-Target-Applications between Subaccounts
entry.content: Hello @Astradyne, Apologies that I did not see your question earlier and I assume you already got aware of it, but just to let everyone else know: Transport for SAP Build Apps using SAP Cloud Transport Management has been delivered in the meantime: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800001901&range=FIRST-LAST#;INNO=53792B49CEA71EEE82B835C4EFA2A152. Best regards, Boris

entry.title: Re: Transport auf Multi-Target-Applications between Subaccounts
entry.content:
Hello @EC,

Correct, the Landscape Portal is for SAP BTP ABAP environment only. Of course, it depends a little bit on the boundary conditions (how many apps do you have, how often do you come up with new versions and to how many customers shall these then be delivered). Many partners actually use SAP Cloud Transport Management for this purpose and I can share a corresponding OEM document with you - for this, please send me a short email to <first name>.<second name>(at)sap.com and I can send it to you (as this is not a public document, released for SAP and partners only). The main idea is pretty straight forward - you use an instance of cTMS in your landscape and set up connections to your client's subaccounts - when you have a new version, you transport it via cTMS into your client's test landscape (considering the existing SLAs you have defined with them), they test it and in case they are fine with propagating it, you trigger the import into their production landscape from cTMS.

Best regards,
Boris

entry.title: Re: SAP ARIBA integration with a third-party system
entry.content:
Dear Mr. Martin

We have received client's requirement to integrate SAGE X3 ERP with SAP Ariba sourcing suite, but client is not having SAP integration suite as a part of scope.

In this case how can we integrate 

  • Product Master (Sage X3 ERP to SAP Ariba)
  • Supplier Master (SAP Ariba to Sage X3 ERP)
  • PR (Sage X3 ERP to SAP Ariba)
  • PO (SAP Ariba to Sage X3 ERP)

Requesting your guidance and support us with any documentation or material available to proceed.

Thank you

Regards

Prathamesh

entry.title: BTP应用的高可用-从单AZ到多AZ到多Region
entry.content:
本文内容来自Architecting solutions on SAP BTP for High Availab... - SAP Community，Distributed Resiliency of SAP CAP applications usi... - SAP Community，目的是帮助您理解架构设计如何为应用提供更高的韧性

 

如果您对BTP感兴趣，BTP个人精选内容目录 | SAP Blogs 可能有更多你需要的内容

 

本文档包含以下部分：

1.前言

2.三种级别的可用性

3.High level实现步骤

 

1.前言：

SAP BTP 拥有很多能力，但并不具有所有能力，所以在成熟架构中的BTP往往会结合其他技术，例如 PostgreSQL on BTP实际上就利用了IaaS厂商Host的数据库、以及其他服务例如对象存储。

同时，BTP提供了SAP Private Link以从更快速更安全的内部网络从BTP连接到其所在的IaaS数据中心，进而连接到该IaaS厂商的所有数据中心。

 

本文主题是如何构建支持在 SAP BTP 上运行的关键应用程序实现高可用性（HA）的解决方案。由于 SAP BTP 运行在IaaS之上，它可以受益于IaaS所采用的成熟的AZ机制。

 

AZ（AZ）是单个地理区域内的单一故障域，是具有独立电力、网络和冷却设施的不同物理位置。一个Region内存在多个AZ，它们通过低延迟网络相互连接。SAP BTP 服务基于底层IaaS的AZ运行，从而实现高可用性。因此，如果其中一个AZ发生故障，服务 / 应用程序将自我修复，并继续由该区域内的其他AZ提供服务。

 

BTP在不同的 IaaS 提供商上提供遍布全球的 SAP BTP 账户，无论您是开发 Fiori 应用程序作为扩展，还是使用集成套件开发接口，都可以轻松地在不同提供商的 BTP 账户之间移动这些项目。

 

在下面的解决方案图中包含了开发 / 测试 / 生产环境（位于美国 Azure）和另一个生产环境（位于欧盟 Azure）。所有的开发和测试都在标记为开发 / 测试的子账户中进行，并且通过传输管理服务将更改推送到整个环境中。如您所见，两个地区各有一个生产性子账户。请参考有关应用程序部署最佳实践的文档。传输管理和持续集成 / 持续交付（CI/CD）服务的路线图会不断更新。请检查您要传输的项目是否受支持。

 

2.三种级别的可用性

要提高应用的可用性，

首先可以做的是在同一BTP子账户下增加实例，用以在同一数据中心中部署多份应用，BTP会自动根据不同实例的可用性来切换服务

其次，我们还可以将应用部署在同一Region的多个AZ

最后，我们还可以将应用部署在不同Region

 

场景 1：跨AZ故障转移

对于终端客户来说，这是透明的，流量会根据负载和可用性被定向到 Fiori Launchpad。

 

 

场景 2：跨Region故障转移与负载分配

 

 

假设终端用户分散在欧盟和美国，并且希望对 SAP BTP 上暴露的 Fiori Launchpad进行负载均衡。Fiori 启动台部署在欧盟和美国的 SAP BTP 账户上。两个启动台都配置了相同的自定义域名。为了便于说明，我使用了 Azure 流量管理器，它是一个基于 DNS 的流量负载均衡器。流量管理器的目的是在这两个启动台之间分配流量，并且还支持在其中一个启动台出现故障时（例如，当维护窗口导致服务中断等情况），将流量路由到另一个启动台实例。您可以配置不同的路由规则，为终端用户提供最佳体验。有一份最佳实践文档，解释了一些如何识别故障转移以及使用基于规则的解决方案（如 Akamai ION）的方法。

在SAP官方的参考架构图中也可以找到类似设计:  Architecting multi-region resiliency for SAP BTP use cases

 

3.实现路径：

有多种原则和模式可用于提升应用程序的弹性。然而，要找到最适合自己应用程序的组合并非易事。《在 SAP BTP 上开发弹性应用程序指南》概述了你可采用的各种选项，以及关于你可能运用的特定模式的详细信息。

大多数 SAP BTP 服务支持使用可用区（AZ）来实现高可用性。不过，可用区局限于单个区域，对于关键任务应用程序而言，这是不够的。实施多区域架构，可进一步减少停机时间、降低区域延迟，或者单纯将此架构用作负载均衡器，在不同区域间分散不断增长的流量。

运用多区域架构概念的应用程序的双活（分布式弹性）设置。

解决方案架构

 

使用 SAP HANA Cloud 的 SAP CAP 应用程序分布式弹性

 

在这个用法中，SAP CAP 应用程序分布在不同区域，并连接到 SAP HANA Cloud 数据库。传入请求通过 Azure 流量管理器路由到相应区域。

 

为优化应用程序的响应时间，我们建议将其部署在目标受众和后端系统所在的数据中心。例如，欧洲的用户可选择法兰克福和阿姆斯特丹的数据中心。

 

注意：如果你希望在不同区域的数据中心部署应用程序，请注意可能存在与合法数据处理限制相关的问题。欲了解更多信息，请参阅《数据保护与隐私》。

High Level的实施步骤

  1. 在来自不同区域或超大规模云服务提供商的两个子账户中使用 SAP BTP Cloud Foundry 运行时。
  2. 自定义域名 URL 作为 SAP CAP 应用程序的单一入口点。
  3. 使用 SAP BTP 自定义域名服务，配置自定义域名并将其映射到 SAP CAP 应用程序的路由。
  4. Azure 流量管理器是一个智能组件，可监控应用程序的运行状况，并在发生故障转移时将用户请求发送到另一个区域。
  5. 使用 SAP 云传输管理服务，将 SAP CAP 应用程序顺利同步到多个区域。

 

在实施此架构时，要考虑不同子账户中重复服务的订阅成本，并确保应用程序始终保持同步。还需要配置单点登录（SSO），以实现区域间的无缝切换。

如果你想尝试此场景，我们在SAP发现中心有详细的分步任务说明

 


关于本文内容有任何问题或见解，欢迎在评论区留下你的想法，如果需要帮助，也可以直接联系到我 arthuryang1996@foxmail.com，感谢你的时间

entry.title: In SAP Screen personas scripting how to give a beep sound when a particular screen is shown?
entry.content: I need to give a beep sound when a particular screen is shown using scripting in SAP screen personas. How to identify a screen when it gets navigated from a different screen. I have some controls on this screen but I need to provide the beep sound right when it shows up. I tried putting the beep audio call in Onbeforerefresh and Onload screen events but if I dont put a condition it beeps for all screens. If I put a condition for a control which exist in the screen it is not successful since I think the controller loads after the screen is loaded. So my plan is to find the screen number and put a condition on the screen number so that when it loads it can sound the beep. Appriciate any help on this

entry.title: Re: Consumption/Adjusting the usage Cycle to PRT in Publi...
entry.content:
Greetings,

unfortunately I am not sure regarding the cloud but on premise it is possible.

Formula:

PrT definition in production order:

One time operation level confirmation:

Review of measurement documents (see partial conformations where difference is 0):

 

Next step is to define a maintenance plan which gets triggered every (for example) 5 usages.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: Pricing in V2 how to integrate with ERP and or upload...
entry.content:
Hello,

Little update from my side. With regards to item 1, we use the upload functionality in the prices app it self:

Menu - Prices

You can first enter on price record manually and then make an export, so that you have a reference on how the price import file needs to be filled.

MJ

entry.title: Re: Possible to add a new supplier whose master data does...

entry.title: Unable to move Cross container HANA Cloud artifacts to Quality space in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have created a calculation view where we have a cross container access to different HDI container and we have created all required config files to connect and it worked well in Dev space and deployment also successful.

Now when we tried to move to Quality space and we are using CTMS in BTP to move to Quality.
We are getting below error while moving to quality space.


"Async operation for service binding between app "zcom__xxxdb1-deployer" and service instance "zcom_XXX-db2" failed with "10009 CF-UnableToPerform bind could not be completed: VCAP::CloudController::V3::LastOperationFailedState".

Any help will be appreciated. Thank you.

entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code(Chennai, India)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event will give you a hands-on experience with SAP Build for building apps and business processes without code (Low Code/No Code). 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A business app for an online store (SAP Build Apps).
  • A business process for approving purchases (SAP Build Process Automation).
  • A business website (SAP Build Work Zone).

You will get to know the SAP Build lobby, where you access all your SAP Build artifacts, and get a deeper understanding of the following topics:

 

  • SAP Build Apps
    • Connecting to a backend service
    • Building UIs
    • Binding data
    • Navigation
    • Triggering processes from your app
    • Deploy App to BTP

 

  • SAP Build Process Automation: 
    • Creating a process
    • Adding approvals
    • Creating actions
    • Calling SAP backends (SAP S/4HANA Cloud and CAP services)
    • Updating data
    • Conditions and GoTo flows
    • Custom variables

 

  • SAP Build Work Zone(Standard Edition)
    • Create site
    • Create page
    • Create space
    • Embed a Build App

Location

BCS (No 162, Essar Construction, Kundrathur High Road, Gerugambakkam, Chennai 600122) 

  • This is an in-person event only (not virtual)
  • Thank you to BCS for hosting

Date

Thursday, February 6th, 2025, from 9:00 to 16:00 IST

  • A light lunch will be served.

Language

English

The instructors are SAP Developer Advocates @Rekha_DR  and @eshrinivasan 

 

Please note that spaces are limited to 30. 

  • If you want to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section.

 

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • Complete these SAP Build prerequisites before you come: Set Up Prerequisites for SAP Build CodeJam

entry.title: Re: Request in SAP
entry.content: Hello, Can you please add more context to your question. For example what object, characteristics (including dates), key figures are involved?

entry.title: Group Reporting and Preperation Ledger
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a few questions regarding the Group Reporting and the Preperation ledger. 

 

we would like to release the data for our ConsUnits from FI beginning from 2024.09.

As we cannot realign data for closed periods by our internal directive, the preparation ledger cannot be used – at least not for the initial loads into Group Reporting (since it would post into ACDOCA – FI is used already for over 20 years).

 

The prep ledger integration is set to 1001 currently and cannot be changed without SAP support. This is why we would like to know how to best deal with our situation.

 

I have following questions:

  • Can the preparation ledger integration be changed/deactivated and the ordinary data release be used instead without expected issues?
  • Would it also be an option to activate the ledger beginning from 2025 and use the ordinary data release only for the 2024 loads into Group Reporting?
  • What is the best practice in such cases?
  • Who needs to do those changes?

 

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: SAP Ariba integration with SAGE ERP (Third Party)
entry.content:
Dear Experts

We have received client's requirement to integrate SAGE X3 ERP with SAP Ariba sourcing suite, but client is not having SAP integration suite as a part of scope.

In this case how can we integrate 

  • Product Master (Sage X3 ERP to SAP Ariba)
  • Supplier Master (SAP Ariba to Sage X3 ERP)
  • PR (Sage X3 ERP to SAP Ariba)
  • PO (SAP Ariba to Sage X3 ERP)

Requesting your guidance and support us with any documentation or material available to proceed.

Thank you

Regards

Prathamesh

entry.title: DB13 Backup issue
entry.content:
hi

I am a beginner. I installed an SAP server ECC 6.0 and want to take a backup via DB13, but I have received errors. kindly provide proper solution.

14.01.2025 12:17:33 Job started
14.01.2025 12:17:33 Step 001 started (program RSDBAJOB, variant &0000000000320, user ID AJAMIL)
14.01.2025 12:17:33 Execute logical command BRBACKUP On host ADCPRD
14.01.2025 12:17:33 Parameters:-u / -jid FLL__20250114121733 -c force -t online -m full -p initprd.sap
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0051I BRBACKUP 7.20 (36)
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0055I Start of database backup: bfqesuob.fnd 2025-01-14 12.17.33
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0484I BRBACKUP log file: G:\oracle\PRD\sapbackup\bfqesuob.fnd
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0280I BRBACKUP time stamp: 2025-01-14 12.17.33
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0301E SQL error -1017 at location BrDbConnect-2, SQL statement:
14.01.2025 12:17:33 'CONNECT /'
14.01.2025 12:17:33 ORA-01017: invalid username/password; logon denied
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0310E Connect to database instance PRD failed
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0280I BRBACKUP time stamp: 2025-01-14 12.17.33
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0301E SQL error -1017 at location BrDbConnect-2, SQL statement:
14.01.2025 12:17:33 'CONNECT /'
14.01.2025 12:17:33 ORA-01017: invalid username/password; logon denied
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0310E Connect to database instance PRD failed
14.01.2025 12:17:33
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0056I End of database backup: bfqesuob.fnd 2025-01-14 12.17.33
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0280I BRBACKUP time stamp: 2025-01-14 12.17.33
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BR0054I BRBACKUP terminated with errors
14.01.2025 12:17:33 External program terminated with exit code 3
14.01.2025 12:17:33 BRBACKUP returned error status E
14.01.2025 12:17:33 Job finished

entry.title: Re: Difference between first bin location and default bin...
entry.content:
Hi,

default Bin-Location means, every time SAP needs a bin location (e.g. GRPO) the system would choose it first.

First Bin-Location is set by the system and is the first bin (sorting by name) which contains the item.

regards

Lothar

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Hello @ThomasK,

new time line is mentioned in the blog above:

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Extend suppliers with a different number as BP via DMC
entry.content:
Dear All,
I have a situation, where I have Employee vendors in my system. Now I need to extend (via Data migration cockpit) these but the BP number and the relevant vendor number should be different. How this can be achieved?

entry.title: Re: Make keyfigure show no value
entry.content:
Hi Jens,

I do not think that is possible. Showing "nothing" / "empty" in a report is always "a bit of a thing", and some how 0 is a way of presenting a type of "nothing".

What i did in a situation where we had to visualize values and 0 / no values in reports, i added exceptions (via the manage data option in the report, and use some color for example for the values > 1 which takes of the attention a bit of the zeros.

MJ

entry.title: Re: Account Code and Name Query with Parent and Child in same Row
entry.content: Hi Rah, could you please add a screenshot showing a part of your Chart of Accounts, that shows the structure? Just to visualize what your expected result is based on. Regards, Johan

Not required , in communication system just upload the certificate name ( pk_e3........) like this you have right.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 HANA memory issue
entry.content:
Hi Anand Ramachandran,

Issue description: "...the root cause as HANA memory is low..."
"However after restart of services it resumes to function as normal & we will not face any issue for a month(approx) again same happens,"

Issue:
Memory problem that (regularly) occurs after restarting the service, approx. after a month. So SAP HANA uses more and more memory over time until reach the limit.

I recommend you the following documents to analyze the issue:

  1. Collected information about memory in context of SAP HANA
  2. SAP GUI - Transaction Code - DBACOCKPIT (Load History) 
  3. 3284834 - SQL Statement Collection: "HANA_Configuration_Minichecks" report for SAP HANA
  4. 3456746 - SQL Statement Collection: "HANA_Memory_OutOfMemoryEvents" report for SAP HANA
  5. 3330262 - SQL Statement Collection: "HANA_Memory_Overview" report for SAP HANA

Regards,
Laszlo

entry.title: Re: 🎉 Exciting News: I’m SAP Certified! 🎉
entry.content: Congratulations.

entry.title: SAC: combining data in dataset, model from files.
entry.content:
Hello,

new to SAC, i use trial version. I have problem when loading csv. files to the model. It's a classical example of database tables, where you have multiple tables joined by keys. 

What i want to achieve:
my example data consist basically from two master data tables airporst.csv, airlines.csv, which describe specific details for each airline or airport,  and one transaction data (also csv) flights.csv. I want to joint these three tables into one in modeller.
Flights.csv have a int foreign key airport_id and airlines_id that can be joined to airport.csv and airlines.csv tables.
It's very easy to join these three tables into one result table with sql, pandas, powerBi but impossible task in SAC. Why ? How do you combine data in modeler ? 

I saw 3 years old yt tutorial video  which shows button for merging data. However, in new SAC version this button is missing. Is this problem with trial version or general SAC problem ? 

Thank you all for aswers,

Victor

entry.title: Re: Custom Enhancement Tab in SAP GUI
entry.content:
Hello Gunadharshini,

To make the necessary adjustments in SAP On-Premise, please go to transaction SIMG and follow this path:

Project System -> Structures -> Operative Structures -> Network -> Enhancements for Networks -> Develop Customer-Specific Fields in Network Header.

Take a look at the documentation. You need to set up the enhancement CNEX0016 as described in the documentation.

Let me know if it works.

Best regards,

Tobias

entry.title: Warehouse cannot always be changed in A/R Credit Memo
entry.content:
Hi,

When you copy a Sales Return to a A/R Credit Memo, the warehouse is not editable in the A/R Credit Memo. The column appears blocked, while it is active in the forum settings.

When you copy an A/R Invoice to a Credit Memo, you can change te warehouse in the A/R Credit Memo.

Why is there a difference and can this be changed somewhere in the settings?

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG feature File Download and File Upload.
entry.content:
Hi Shweta,

Your understanding is correct!

The most convenient way to create materials/bp in load is using consolidation processes. In case you do not want consolidation, you can also try for Data import framework.  These options will take less time and efforts compared to file uploads.

entry.title: Re: How to configure the Change record and capture the changes done in master data
entry.content: Hi, have you implemented the changes with a Change Master connected to the Change Record? Also - have you checked the scope of the configuration of your impact analysis? Thanks much, Ulf.

entry.title: Custom PP report is generating in Quality System but not in Production system.
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Recent PP support team created one custom report in Z transaction. This report is about pp packing list. When we give input from notepad ( Header level material and its requirement )

System create packing list in z transaction which contains required BOM component quantity.

My query is, it is working perfectly fine in quality system for all materials but it is not working in production system for some materials. What could be the problem ?  Do I need to check missing table entries in production ?

Can you please help me wit inputs

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG feature File Download and File Upload.
entry.content:
Hi Shweta,

Your understanding is correct!

The most convenient way to create materials/bp in load is using consolidation processes. In case you do not want consolidation, you can also try for Data import framework.  These options will take less time and efforts compared to file uploads.

entry.title: Re: Custom PP report is generating in Quality System but not in Production system.
entry.content: It's a custom Z-report, specific to your implementation. No one here can help you, unfortunately. We don't know your report.
